title: Import Model
description: RJSF form schema for the import-model modal. Captures the user-input fields drawn from the canonical MesheryModelImportFormPayload schema in meshery/schemas/constructs/v1beta2/model/api.yml. The uploadType discriminator determines which branch's conditional required fields apply. Field shape, types, and required lists MUST stay a subset of the canonical MesheryModelImportFormPayload; the Go validator at validation/forms_test.go enforces that.

uploadType.title: Upload method
uploadType.description: Choose the method you prefer to upload your model file. Select 'File Import' or 'CSV Import' if you have the file on your local system, or 'URL Import' if you have the file hosted online.

fileName.title: File name
fileName.description: Name of the model file being uploaded.

modelFile.title: Model file
modelFile.description: RFC 2397 data URL emitted by the RJSF FileWidget — shape `data:<mime>;base64,<payload>`. `<payload>` is the base64-encoded model archive accepted by the import API; consumers strip the `data:<mime>;base64,` prefix before posting. Supported formats: .tar, .tar.gz, .tgz.

url.title: URL
url.description: A direct URL to a single model file. Supported formats: .tar, .tar.gz, .tgz.
